title: delphinium stachydeum
intro: Delphinium stachydeum, also known as the Mediterranean larkspur, is a perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its tall spikes of blue or white flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to induce sweating and relieve fever. The health benefits of Delphinium stachydeum include its use as a diaphoretic, helping to reduce body temperature and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Delphinium stachydeum can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing the flowers in hot water, or as a tincture by extracting the plant's active compounds in a solvent.
